article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.6. 2026 General Local  Election Cost-Sharing Agreement With SD 41 (2026.01.27).pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on cost-sharing agreement with School District 41 for 2026 election
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on allowing the City's Chief Election Officer to sign a cost-sharing agreement with Burnaby School District 41, so the City can run the School Trustee election on the School District's behalf on October 17, 2026.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — no direct business impact expected, but note the election date: October 17, 2026.
